files_migrated: 0DTE:gex/base.py -> src/spy_der/features/gex.py (OI signed-dollar-gamma, gamma flip, call/put walls, concentration)
files_deferred: GEX variants beyond OI (volume/hybrid/weekly, gex/volume_proxy.py, gex/hybrid.py, gex/weekly.py) -> later structural pass; the OI baseline is authoritative per System A.
History-dependent structure (velocities, wall stability/rupture, pin score, market_dynamics.py, realized vol) -> requires a rolling feature service; recorded in StructuralState.missing_fields.
Full rnd_extractor pipeline (total-variance fitting, smooth call reconstruction, arbitrage repair) -> layered onto the bounded RND core later.
behavior_preserved: Signed dollar gamma = gamma * weight * 100 * spot^2 * 0.01; dealer-short-calls/long-puts sign (calls +, puts -).
net_gex/gross in $bn; gamma flip by cumulative-gamma sign crossing with linear interpolation; call wall = max call gamma at strike >= spot; put wall = max put gamma at strike <= spot.
GexRankWindow reads neutral 0.5 until min_samples, ranks abs(net_gex) over a multi-day horizon, and survives restarts via atomic JSON (corrupt state re-warms).
intentional_changes: GEX consumes the Phase 1 CanonicalMarketSnapshot option chain (OptionQuote gamma + open_interest) instead of provider WeightedContract objects.

RND implemented as a bounded, dependency-light Breeden-Litzenberger core (finite differences on a uniform strike grid, non-negativity clip, normalization) that returns None when unsupported rather than fabricating a density (spec §67).
StructuralState is a typed, content-addressed contract; single-snapshot pass records history-dependent fields as missing (spec §22).

tests.name: pytest (54 tests incl. RND recovering a lognormal sigma)

known_gaps: Only the OI GEX variant is implemented; volume/hybrid/weekly variants and cross-variant disagreement are deferred.
RND is a bounded first cut (no smoothing/arbitrage repair); it is validated to recover a Black-Scholes lognormal sigma within tolerance but is not yet the full System A pipeline.
Volatility summary covers ATM straddle / expected move; term structure and realized/implied relationships are a later pass.
Structural parity is determinism/golden-file against a synthetic chain; parity against a running System A structural state is future work.
rollback: Revert the Phase 3 commit. Phases 0-2 are unaffected; no runtime services or persisted state beyond the opt-in GexRankWindow file (best-effort, self-healing).
numpy was added as an explicit dependency (already transitively present via pandas); removing the feature modules removes the direct use.
next_phase: Phase 4 — MTF and Legacy (spec §63): resampling, multi-timeframe features, normalization, dynamics, the Legacy analyzer, permissions, veto classification, and LegacyDecisionView.
